architecture_fit.note: Minimal delta from base_model: one self-attention head, MLP dropped, sinusoidal position features + hand-set rotation W_Q / identity W_K; predecessor selection is genuinely computed by the QK dot-product (align=1.0 at shift=-1).

baseline_comparison.note: Contrasts the head against a random-attention strawman (~0.03) and the uniform 1/(T-1) baseline, plus an offset×shift matrix whose off-diagonals collapse to ~0 — robustness ratio 545.

faithfulness.note: Ablations are excellent (zero positions / identity rotation → uniform; zero/shuffle tokens → unchanged, proving the head is positional), but for a hand-set circuit this is partly tautological — no evidence a trained model converges to this mechanism.

operating_range.note: Sweeps T = 8…512 (>2 orders of magnitude), perfect to T≈64 then graceful, well-explained decay (0.52@128, 0.13@512) from the fixed 32-frequency budget — honest, not silent collapse.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: The entire circuit is hand-set (rotation-by-δ W_Q, identity W_K) and reproduces the target behaviour exactly — textbook hand-built-circuit evidence of mechanism understanding.

visual_judgement.note: Five purposeful panels, each mapped to a claim; the offset×shift diagonal matrix is a strong falsifiable lead view; app exposes demo: gr.Blocks, defaults to latest run, events inside the Blocks context.

visualisation_rationale.note: README 'Why this visualisation' justifies every chart's axes, baseline and grain, and ties the bright-diagonal signature to the 'mechanism computes the target' claim.

notes: A strong, honest attempt that fixes the prior tautology by computing predecessor attention through a genuine positional QK circuit — a clean minimal delta from base_model with the MLP dropped. Baselines, ablations, the offset×shift identity matrix and an honest operating-range curve all corroborate the claim, and the whole circuit is hand-set (full bonus). Only real limitation: faithfulness is demonstrated on the hand-built weights rather than on a learned model.
